reviews.review_description:
Sortik Systems offers an elegant approach to puzzle/action VR.
You quickly organize, sort, and classify elements by color or shape in a sleek and stylish setting.
Speed ​​becomes essential as the levels progress.
The game starts off easy, but by level 13, the pressure mounts, and any inattention can cost you an additional attempt. The design is remarkable: one-handed operation (controllers or hand tracking), and seated options are a real plus for accessibility.
The interface is simple and unadorned, enhancing immersion.
An effective 6-level tutorial trains you in all the game's principles and mechanics.
The story mode offers about an hour of challenge, with a touch of humor.
Technically, the experience is fluid, very well executed, and requires no internet connection.
A simple game on paper, but rigorously designed and thought out for the player's enjoyment.
Perfect for strengthening concentration, sharpening reflexes, and making it a good mental exercise in VR. A favorite!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your enthusiasm and for taking the time to write something so awesome!
It means a lot to me to read such detailed and positive feedback.
I'm really glad that you enjoyed it so much!

reviews.review_description:
Sortik Systems starts off simple, sorting items into the correct categories, then it ramps it up with speed and more complex sorting options.  Simple concept that gets you thinking!  Room for improvement, needs some volume controls but not a deal breaker.
The only question remaining is what lies are the megacorporation telling you?!

Check out my first impressions gameplay over on my YouTube channel!
😁✌️☮️❤️

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your amazing 5-star review and for taking the time to share your thoughts! 😊

I'm really glad you enjoyed challenging your brain and reflexes with Sortik Systems. Indeed, the initial simplicity is just the calm before the storm! ⚡

I truly appreciate you mentioning the volume controls. It's incredibly valuable feedback that I'll keep in mind for future updates to improve the experience. In the meantime, you can use the Mute button in the menu (the red button on the left side of the convey) to turn off the music.

And that final question about the megacorporation’s secrets is exactly what I was hoping to provoke! 😉 I hope you keep playing to uncover all the layers of the story.

A huge thanks for sharing your gameplay on your channel! It was awesome to see you enjoying (and dancing to!) the game.

A big hug and thanks again for all your support.
☮️❤️

reviews.review_description:
This game isn’t just about reflexes — it’s about reprogramming your brain through meaningful, story-driven gameplay. Unlike titles that just throw random mechanics at you, this one builds a structured narrative around cognitive training, and the result is deeply engaging.

What really stood out is the range of emotions you experience while playing — and how those feelings are tied to your skill level. You’ll feel a rush of satisfaction when you correctly place an item in the right spot, the thrill of being in the zone as the pace accelerates and you still keep up, and even a spike of stress when you’re holding one item while two more suddenly drop in. It’s a mental rhythm game with logic and pressure beautifully balanced.

The Practice Mode is a smart addition, letting you sharpen your technique and show off your mastery without the stakes of a main run. And if you enjoy problem-solving, the mechanics feel a lot like visual programming:
"If red AND blue BUT NOT green, then place here..."

It’s clever, it’s challenging, and it’s one of the most thoughtfully designed brain-training experiences in VR. If you're looking for something that sharpens your mind while also telling a story, this is a unique game. Your new Tetris game?

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for such a thoughtful and detailed analysis!

I'm deeply moved that you captured the essence of the game so precisely, that combination of narrative, cognitive challenge, and emotional balance I wanted to create.

Reading how you described each emotion and moment of tension or satisfaction makes me feel like the design achieved exactly what I intended.

Comments like yours not only motivate me but also validate the effort behind every mechanic. It's an honor to know you enjoyed it at that level!

A big hug and thank you again for your support!

Alex Pamp

reviews.review_description:
The tutorial is very clear. The first 5 levels offer different sorting options. From level 13 it starts to get a bit more difficult. You really have to concentrate to make no mistakes. From then on I had to restart a level several times to beat it. It is mainly the levels where an item cannot have a certain color that are more difficult. 

Very nice game for young and old. It looks easier than it actually is.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your detailed and kind feedback!

It truly motivates me to know that you appreciated the game's details so much, especially those related to the difficulty curve and the clarity of the tutorial. Comments like yours are incredibly valuable to me as a developer.

I'm really glad you enjoyed it!

Warm regards.

reviews.review_description: The game is so good it’s nice to just chill in if your looking for more info or gameplay I have a gameplay video on my channel covering the game to check it out

developer_response.body: Thanks for the support, FNCSKieranYT! It's great to know that you find the game to be such a nice place to relax. Great idea with the video, I'm sure it's really helpful for other players looking for more info. Cheers!

:D
Glad you like it. Thanks for stopping by to leave a comment!

Hope you keep enjoying it!

Alex Pamp
